description_long: This fountain features a prominent circular marble structure set atop a hexagonal base that is decorated with a blue water-like pattern, simulating a pool. The main body consists of a large cylindrical pedestal with a thick, upright circular disk at its center, which bears engraved text. Two smaller rectangular marble blocks are positioned symmetrically on either side of the main cylinder. The base is bordered with a wood-textured trim, adding a naturalistic touch to the otherwise stone-heavy design. The overall appearance is monumental and commemorative, with a clean, geometric aesthetic. The fountain is likely intended as a public landmark or memorial in an urban park or plaza.
description: A monumental marble fountain with a large circular disk, cylindrical base, and blue water-patterned hexagonal platform, accented by wood-textured trim and engraved text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the engraved circular disk, both side blocks, and the full text inscription clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the circular disk and the cylindrical base, with one side block in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the disk and base, with minimal detail and one side block visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the disk's thickness and the other side block, with the text inscription not visible.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features a large engraved circular disk with text, providing a commemorative or informational element. The marble surfaces are smooth and unadorned except for the inscription, giving the structure a minimalist, modern look.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is a flat, hexagonal platform with a blue water-patterned surface, bordered by a wood-textured trim. There are no visible tiers, rims, or compartments, and the basin is primarily decorative.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present on the fountain.
